title: Bewitchment
description: A mod that aims to add witchcraft to Minecraft
body:
# Bewitchment
Bewitchment offers pacts with powerful demons, the ability to become a vampire or werewolf, brew powerful potions, cast rituals, curse your enemies (or friends), and so much more.

To get started, craft the Book of Shadows with a Book and a Mandrake Root, the seeds of which are dropped from grass.

#

```
Q: What's in Bewitchment?
A: Brewing, demon trading, demon pledges, circle rites, fortunes, sigils, incense, curses, poppets, familiars, flying brooms, transformations, and plenty more.

Q: Can I do record a review/mod showcase/let's play with BW?
A: Absolutely! Shoot us a link if you do so!

Q: Can I add BW to a modpack?
A: Sure! However we request the modpack be hosted on CurseForge or Modrinth, as other similar sites, such as Technic, do not give proper credit to the creators.
```
